description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow featuring a large open lawn area with several lounge chairs and a rectangular swimming pool. The structure is predominantly white with large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The main building includes a spacious terrace, a rooftop section, and a partially covered patio area. There are multiple entry points, including a prominent front entrance and a staircase leading from the lawn to the elevated terrace. The design incorporates minimalist lines, geometric forms, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with functional outdoor amenities and a focus on leisure and relaxation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large glass windows, a spacious terrace, and an open lawn featuring lounge chairs and a swimming pool. The design is sleek, minimalist, and emphasizes indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main glass facade, large windows, and the expansive green lawn with lounge chairs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, staircase, swimming pool, and the arrangement of outdoor lounge chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the terrace, rooftop section, and the open lawn area with clear sightlines to the pool.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rooftop area, secondary entrances, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
